message:
fix: add null-safe defaults for search API and date parsing

Search API:
- Add fallback empty strings for title, excerpt, content
- Default category to "Essay" when undefined
- Prevents potential undefined values in search results

MDX Parser:
- Add safe date parsing with NaN check
- Falls back to current date for invalid date strings
- Prevents crashes on malformed frontmatter dates

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
